title: metalasia divergens
intro: Metalasia divergens, also known as the silver tree, is a flowering plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Metalasia divergens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antimicrobial properties that help to fight off infections. The herbal preparations of Metalasia divergens include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues.
